//: solid-server-rs (EXPERIMENTAL Rust Solid server, branch feat/lws) with its opt-in JLWS surface ON: SOLID_SERVER_LWS=1, SOLID_SERVER_LWS_STRICT_PUT=1 (the pure-LWS D2/D3 PUT discipline), RDF transform on (default), in-memory store, SOLID_SERVER_SEED_CONFORMANCE=1. Auth: the LWS RFC 9068 at+jwt Bearer chain against the committed local mock AS (tools/mock-as.mjs; loopback allowed, dev-only) — controllerBearer is the seeded alice's token, so controller requests are authenticated and WAC-authorized inside /alice/; point --target at http://127.0.0.1:3000/alice so the per-run scope lands inside the seeded pod (the server's WAC is fail-closed: with no ACL anywhere access is denied, so an unauthenticated CSS-style run cannot create state). Declarations mirror the storage description at /.well-known/lws honestly: ContentNegotiation (rdf-1) yes; RecursiveDelete/MoveResource no (deliberately not offered); notification subscriptions + PoP/DPoP-SK features not declared (the harness's auth seam is Bearer-only; DPoP-SK needs a PoP client seam the black-box harness does not have). The bearer token is minted PER RUN and passed via --controller-bearer — this committed config stays credential-free. Full recipe in `notes` below; see the committed report header for the exact server sha.
notes: Reproduction recipe (three local processes; LOCAL ONLY — the run creates/deletes real resources):
1. Boot the mock AS (this repo): `node test-suite/tools/mock-as.mjs` — OIDC discovery + JWKS + /token on http://127.0.0.1:3999.

2. Boot solid-server-rs (branch feat/lws, sha in the committed report header): `SOLID_SERVER_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 SOLID_SERVER_TRUSTED_ISSUER=http://127.0.0.1:3999 SOLID_SERVER_ALLOW_LOOPBACK=1 SOLID_SERVER_SEED_CONFORMANCE=1 SOLID_SERVER_LWS=1 SOLID_SERVER_LWS_STRICT_PUT=1 cargo run` — the seed writes alice's WebID profile with solid:oidcIssuer = the mock AS, and the default audience is the base URL, matching the minted token's aud/sub.

3. Mint the controller token and run: `TOKEN="$(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3999/token)"` then `node bin/run.mjs --config targets/solid-server-rs.json --target http://127.0.0.1:3000/alice --controller-bearer "$TOKEN" --out-json reports/solid-server-rs-baseline-<date>.json --out-md reports/solid-server-rs-baseline-<date>.md` (from test-suite/).
label: solid-server-rs feat/lws (EXPERIMENTAL, in-memory, LWS surface + strict PUT, authenticated controller)
